research_question: Does a 5-signal equally-weighted linear baseline built from non-redundant price-volume mechanisms survive audit gates on the trainval (2000-2021) snapshot?

promotion_rule.pass_condition: positive_daily_ic_share > 0.52 AND decile_monotonic_ok = true AND sub_period_direction_consistency >= 0.75

disallowed_changes: Do not add or remove signals after model scores are generated.
notes: First confirmatory baseline round. 5 signals selected from distinct mechanism families.
All features use D0-and-earlier market data.
